typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		EmplId as string,
		Name as string,
		CompanyCode as string,
		CompanyName as string,
		JobClass as string,
		WorkDate as string,
		DailyHours as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'FileName',
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/Subcontract_Employee/subcontract_employee*.csv']) ~> srcdfSubcontractEmployeeStage
srcdfSubcontractEmployeeStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/Subcontract_Employee/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'subcontract_employee_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		EmplId as string,
		Name as string,
		CompanyCode as string,
		CompanyName as string,
		JobClass as string,
		WorkDate as string,
		DailyHours as string
	),
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkSubcontractEmployeeRaw
